description_long: This is a Wilson basketball, featuring a classic orange pebbled surface with black channel grooves and prominent branding. The ball displays the 'Wilson' logo in bold black letters, along with the text 'INDOOR GAME BALL' and 'BASKETBALL FINLAND' on one panel. The surface is textured for grip, with deep black seams dividing the ball into traditional curved panels. The material appears to be synthetic leather or composite rubber, designed for durability and optimal bounce. There are no visible signs of wear, dirt, or graffiti, and the inflation valve is not visible in any of the views.
description: A Wilson basketball with an orange pebbled surface, black grooves, and bold branding, designed for indoor play and optimal grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Wilson' logo, 'INDOOR GAME BALL', and 'BASKETBALL FINLAND' text clearly on the orange pebbled surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved black grooves and textured surface, with no visible branding or text.
description_view_2: Another front view with the 'Wilson' logo and 'INDOOR GAME BALL' text visible, but 'BASKETBALL FINLAND' is partially obscured.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the panel grooves and texture, with only a partial glimpse of the logo at the edge.
attribute_brand_logo: Wilson logo in black, centered on one main panel, with 'INDOOR GAME BALL' and 'BASKETBALL FINLAND' below it.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with wide black grooves forming traditional basketball segments.
